# strides

**Instance Property**

The property that defines strides for spatial dimensions.

## Declaration

```swift
var strides: [NSNumber] { get set }
```

## Discussion

Must be four numbers, one for each spatial dimension, fastest running index last. Default value: `@[ @1, @1, @1, @1 ]`
title: strides
